name: Sales Order-custom_picked_at
label: Picked At
description: Stamped automatically when custom_logistics_status first reaches Picked.

name: Sales Order-custom_labeled_at
label: Labeled At
description: Stamped when the label is generated/printed.

name: Sales Order-custom_shipped_at
label: Shipped At
description: Stamped when the order is added to a Shipment manifest.

name: Sales Order-custom_delivered_at
label: Delivered At
description: Stamped when the carrier confirms delivery.

name: Delivery Note-custom_assigned_packer
label: Assigned Packer
description: Packer/shipper who built this parcel (explicit capture, set by the portal).

name: User-custom_logistics_role
label: Logistics Role
description: Portal role. Overrides the emergent-role heuristic in logistics_portal.api.auth.

name: User-custom_logistics_zone
label: Logistics Zone
description: Optional home zone shown on the portal role badge (e.g. FAST ZONE - JM).
